scope: MiMo V2.5 JANGTQ_2 preserved-media capability gate
MiMo V2.5 JANG_2L preserved-media capability gate

root_cause.summary: MiMo V2.5 bundles can preserve vision/audio/video sidecars and token metadata while explicitly stamping text-runtime status. The server-side auto-enable path was willing to advertise media from importable runtime classes plus sidecars alone.
root_cause.risk: image, video, and audio could be advertised as runtime-supported for bundles marked weights_preserved_text_runtime or text_runtime

source_fix.behavior: fail closed before sidecar/runtime-class detection when capabilities.multimodal_status or runtime.multimodal_mode is weights_preserved_text_runtime, text_runtime, text_only, unwired, or preserved_disabled

regression_test.fixture_change: preserved text-runtime fixture now includes visual, audio_encoder, and speech_embeddings index entries so preserved sidecars cannot override explicit text-runtime metadata

focused_pytest.command: .venv/bin/python -m pytest -q tests/test_mimo_v2_media_capability_gate.py -k 'fail_closed_for_preserved_text_runtime or auto_enable_when_runtime_and_sidecars_are_complete or component_and_token_gated or use_processor_audio_token_id or filter_runtime_supported_unwired_modalities'

real_bundle_source_probe.command: .venv/bin/python source capability probe against real local MiMo bundles

real_bundle_bundled_python_probe.command: PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 PYTHONNOUSERSITE=1 PYTHONPATH= panel/bundled-python/python/bin/python3 -B -s bundled capability probe against real local MiMo bundles

not_fixed_or_claimed: MiMo V2.5 JANGTQ_2 literal/exactness red rows remain open
MiMo V2.5 media semantic success is not claimed
release, signing, notarization, package upload, PyPI, updater, download, and website actions were not performed
boundary.other_agent_next_action: If MiMo media is intended for these exact bundles, produce or restamp an explicit multimodal-runtime artifact and live-prove image, video, and audio through the app/API. Do not override preserved/text-runtime metadata in the server.
